$comment: DESIGN PROTOTYPE — not interpreted by any host. The concept paper's §8 schema, rewritten against the editor catalog's real binding ceiling (literal | selectionProperty + coerce; NO visibleWhen — conditional visibility must come from a derived bound value in the plugin state model, see BREAKAGE_LOG.md B-01). Becomes the P4 test corpus when native panels move onto a schema.

sections.$comment: Paper had visibleWhen strokeType == dashed. The catalog forbids conditionals; the real panel exposes a derived 'dashControlsVisible' bound value from plugin state, or ships as an expert leaf. Engine gap: no dash-pattern PropertyPath yet (B-12).
